UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORAIS, JACKELINE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, MOLLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAIS, JACKELINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 29 BALBOA STREET #2 (REAR UNIT), SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP SECTION 415.46
